subject: Re: Manually deslected tilt still used for tomogram reconstruction
body:
Hi Dimitry,

Thanks for the quick answer. Yes, they are labelled as False, but it 
doesn't change anything. Could it be a bug on my local installation ?

Cheers

Alain

Le vendredi 22 octobre 2021 à 11:49:21 UTC+2, teg...@gmail.com a écrit :

> Hi Alain,
>
> If you look into the /TiltSeries/UseTilt node of the corresponding XML 
> file, are the tilts marked as 'False'?
>
> Cheers,
> Dimitry
>
> On Friday, October 22, 2021 at 11:28:08 AM UTC+2 alain....@gmail.com 
> wrote:
>
>>
>> Hi all,
>>
>> I have some tomograms series where the extremes tilts are way too thick 
>> and where there was issue with tracking.
>>
>> Is there an easy way to remove those from the tomogram reconstruction 
>> other than modifying the mdoc file before going to imod ?
>>
>> I tried to deselect manually those tilt in tomostar mode of Warp, 
>> unchecking the boxes in the fourier space view, but they are still used to 
>> generate the tomograms.
>>
>> Thank you for your help.
>>
>> Best wishes,
>>
>> Alain
>>
>
